name: Chat with Google Sheets data
description: Reads data from a Google Sheets spreadsheet, uses Claude to answer natural language questions about the data, and posts the answer to Slack with rich Block Kit formatting including data summaries and insights.

source.originalName: Chat with a Google Sheet using AI

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for reading data

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting answers

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID (from the URL)

question.description: Natural language question about the spreadsheet data

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Parse and format sheet data for analysis
Build Claude prompt for data Q&A
Run Claude AI for data analysis
Build Slack Block Kit data answer
